title: paspalum pallens
intro: Paspalum pallens, also known as the slender paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum pallens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparation of Paspalum pallens typically involves drying and processing the leaves and stems to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
